message:
🐛 Revert demoWhenEmpty default + throw when no data source available (#2784)

Reverts PR #2783 (demoWhenEmpty default) which caused cards to show
demo data even when the agent was connected and the user was in
live/AI mode. Empty results (no pod issues = healthy) were incorrectly
treated as "no data" and replaced with demo data.

Proper fix: fetchers for pod issues, deployments, deployment issues,
and nodes now throw when neither agent nor backend is available
(instead of returning []). This makes the cache layer:
1. Preserve any existing cached data
2. Track the failure with backoff retry
3. NOT overwrite real data with empty arrays
4. NOT show demo data in live mode

Once the agent connects (1-3 seconds), the retry succeeds and real
data appears.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -791,7 +791,7 @@ export function useCache<T>({
   persist = true,
   autoRefresh = true,
   enabled = true,
-  demoWhenEmpty = demoData !== undefined,
+  demoWhenEmpty = false,
   liveInDemoMode = false,
   merge,
   shared = true,
